# What Is a Mill Law Firm? -- Bankruptcy Mill Guide [2026] -- Whatmilllaw
> What makes a law firm a bankruptcy mill? Volume thresholds, fee patterns, and quality indicators. Data-driven analysis updated for 2026.

## About
whatmilllaw.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- What Is a Mill Law Firm? -- Bankruptcy Mill Guide [2026] -- Whatmilllaw: https://whatmilllaw.org/
- Warning Signs of a High-Volume Bankruptcy Practice -- Whatmilllaw: https://whatmilllaw.org/warning-signs.html
- How High-Volume Practices Affect Bankruptcy Cases -- Whatmilllaw: https://whatmilllaw.org/case-impact.html
- What is a Bankruptcy Mill? -- Whatmilllaw: https://whatmilllaw.org/what-is-mill-law.html
- Protecting Yourself from Poor Bankruptcy Representation -- Whatmilllaw: https://whatmilllaw.org/protecting-yourself.html
- Academic Research on Bankruptcy Attorney Quality -- Whatmilllaw: https://whatmilllaw.org/academic-research.html
- U.S. Trustee Oversight of Bankruptcy Attorneys -- Whatmilllaw: https://whatmilllaw.org/ust-oversight.html

- Website: https://openbankruptcyproject.org

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
